banner_matchers.value:
^HTTP/1\.1 404 Not Found
Date: .*
Server: eserver ([\d.]+)
Accept-Ranges: bytes
Content-Type: text/html
Content-Length: \d+

<html><head><title>404 File not found - eserver is not a HTTP server</title>
